title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - No
scenario: Tapping "No" on Clear Trusted Devices confirmation popup in Device Settings closes popup without clearing list and headset remains connected
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Navigate to the Reset Device tab
Observe the confirmation popup with 'No' and 'Yes' buttons
expected: The confirmation popup closes, the trusted devices list is not cleared, and the headset remains connected.
